base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_credits_cast_text_variants — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 castlevania. Ending-credits screens — 4 palette-color variants of the 'THE CAST' text showing Dracula/Death/Frankenstein/etc played by horror-movie-actor names (Christopher Bee = Christopher Lee, Belo Lugosi = Bela Lugosi, Boris Karloffice = Boris Karloff, Love Chaney Jr = Lon Chaney Jr, Barber Sherry, Mix Schrecks = Max Schreck). Classic Konami movie-credits homage. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ending-credits screens — 4 palette-color variants of the 'THE CAST' text showing Dracula/Death/Frankenstein/etc played by horror-movie-actor names (Christopher Bee = Christopher Lee, Belo Lugosi = Bela Lugosi, Boris Karloffice = Boris Karloff, Love Chaney Jr = Lon Chaney Jr, Barber Sherry, Mix Schrecks = Max Schreck). Classic Konami movie-credits homage
